title: Team Collaboration, Review, Governance, and Decision Handoffs · Claim Repair Board
summary: A preserved decision record for team collaboration, review, governance, and decision handoffs contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in collaboration operating system and review evidence and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Decompose work into outcome-bearing, low-coupling slices with owner, interface, acceptance, dependencies, and integration point.
Link problem evidence, issue, decision, change, review, verification, release, and follow-up through stable identifiers.
Request review by risk area and require behavior, accessibility, security, data, operations, test, and documentation evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-2 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-2
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Work Decomposition
steps.instruction:
debug case — Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Decompose work into outcome-bearing, low-coupling slices with owner, interface, acceptance, dependencies, and integration point.

Inspect the Work Decomposition trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Work Decomposition.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for decompose work into outcome-bearing, low-coupling slices with owner, interface, acceptance, dependencies, and integration point. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Work Decomposition, keep Work Decomposition connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Work Decomposition, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Work Decomposition, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Work Decomposition precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Work Decomposition, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Decompose work into outcome-bearing, low-coupling slices with owner, interface, acceptance, dependencies, and integration point.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Work Decomposition, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Assigning files to people prevents collaboration conflicts.

stimulus.title: Work Decomposition case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Parallel contributors create oversized changes, invisible decisions, ambiguous ownership, rubber-stamp review, and a release nobody can fully explain. The debug variation 5 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Decompose work into outcome-bearing, low-coupling slices with owner, interface, acceptance, dependencies, and integration point.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Assigning files to people prevents collaboration conflicts.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Decompose work into outcome-bearing, low-coupling slices with owner, interface, acceptance, dependencies, and integration point. Artifact under review: collaboration operating system and review evidence.

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Work Decomposition, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Work Decomposition record says collaboration operating system and review evidence looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the inspect the failure record evidence boundary for Work Decomposition.

For inspect the failure record, apply Work Decomposition without its stated preconditions, omit the collaboration operating system and review evidence trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Work Decomposition for collaboration operating system and review evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Maintain contribution, conduct, security, support, ownership, license, roadmap, release, and archival practices for project health.
